<!-- Thanks for contributing! Keep PRs focused — one skill / one concern. -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and what problem does it solve? -->

## Skill(s) touched

- [ ] image-gen
- [ ] video-use
- [ ] tech-intel
- [ ] repo / tooling (CI, docs, tests)

## Checklist

- [ ] `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests` passes locally.
- [ ] Docs updated to match the change — no phantom flags/files (`SKILL.md`, `README.md`, `TESTING.md` as relevant).
- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or private brand voice / banned-phrase lists committed.
- [ ] New behaviour has a test (or a note here on why it can't be unit-tested offline).
